summary: Reviewed TASK-069 (checkpoint/resume system with SQLite). Validated against STORY-011 acceptance criteria. Implementation delivers complete, production-ready checkpoint/resume capability with CheckpointStore (SQLite persistence), CheckpointManager (high-level API), ResumePlan builder, and 40 passing tests. No scope gaps identified. Approved for merge. Recommendation: Proceed with TASK-070 (retry policies) as highest-value next task. Epic 9 progress: 2/7 tasks complete (29%).
